productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Resp Cushion Sports Shoes
description: The adidas Response Cushion 20M, a running shoe, features a torsion system in the midsole for enhanced stability, and adiPRENE cushioning for ultimate comfort. A high tech running machine hidden under a simple design, the durability of the adidas Response Cushion 20M is driven by the trademark AdiWEAR system in the outsole which is made of tough rubber that not only enhances shoe life, but also promotes traction at its best.UpperMesh upper with synthetic leather overlays for shoe structure and breathable comfortReinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the backfootReinforced overlay over toe box for durability and added protection to the forefootReinforced overlay at the mid-foot regionCentral lace-ups for a customised FitPadded and meshed tongue and collar for comfortMesh fabric lining for ventilationMidsoleadiPRENE cushioning at the midfoot areaRubber midsole for enhanced comfortOutsoleRaised heel for ease of usageDecoupled heel to even the impactImpact lines to distribute shockSuction points all over the heel in blown leather for enhanced gripOutsole reinforced onto the upper for protection of the forefootShoe careRemove dust with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
